docs.title: Rowan Wei GENG | 耿伟
docs.text:
wgeng252@connect.hkust-gz.edu.cn

I am currently (2024-02-04) a second-year M.Phil. student at HKUST(GZ) under the supervision of Prof. Pan Hui and Prof. Gareth Tyson. I also work closely with Prof. Dirk Kutscher.

docs.title: Short Bio
docs.text: Before joining HKUST(GZ), I worked as a Research & Development Software Engineer at Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd.. I obtained my M.Eng and B.Eng from Fudan University and Harbin Engineering University in 2020 and 2017 respectively. I also had internships in Ant Group Co., Ltd. and eBay Inc.. My current research interests lie in the intersection between Extended Reality (XR), Networked Systems, and Computer Vision (CV).

docs.title: Networked Computing Systems
docs.text:
• Information-Centric Networking (ICN) for Efficient and Secure Data Delivery
  • Edge Computing, Offloading, and Collaboration for XR

docs.title: XR and CV
docs.text:
• Human Pose Estimation (HPE) and its Semantic Communication
  • Privacy Protection for Immersive Environments

docs.title: Previous Research Interest(Expertise):
docs.text: • High-Performance Computing (P.S., Programming Language Runtime such as Golang)

docs.title: Performance Optimization of 5G Cloud Core Network
docs.text:
• Work carried out in Huawei 5G Cloud Core Network Department.
  • Resource management of Linux kernel, reduced 2+% CPU usage.
  • Customization of Golang runtime, reduced 7+% CPU usage without modifying existing code.
  • RDMA-based communication between servers for low latency and high throughput, N× faster than TCP.

docs.title: Quality of In-Network Computing
docs.text:
• Course project advised by Prof. Dirk KUTSCHER.
  • Main idea: Enhance the Quality of Service of in-network computing.
  • Implement the prototype on Github QoC.

docs.title: Event-based Human Perception
docs.text: • Course project: Event-based High-speed HPE, advised by Prof. Addison Lin WANG. Working in progress.

docs.title: Working Experience
docs.text:
• Software Engineer - Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China - 2020~2022
  • Intern - Ant Group Co., Ltd., Hangzhou, China - Winter, 2018
  • Intern - eBay Inc., Shanghai, China - Summer, 2019

docs.title: Education
docs.text:
• M.Phil. - The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, Guangzhou, China - 2022~current
  • M.Eng. - Fudan University, Shanghai, China - 2017~2020
  • B.Eng. - Harbin Engineering University, Harbin, China - 2013~2017

  • Chinese Calligraphy

docs.title: News
docs.text:
News

2024-3: Glad to visit Technische Universität Munich. 2024-2: Glad to visit Politecnico di Milano. 2023-09-04: Honored to be selected to receive an ACM Travel Grant and an RBM Research Travel Grant. 2023-08-16: Glad to become a reviewer for ACM ICN 2023 Poster and Demo Track. 2023-08-07: We got an accepted paper in ACM ICN 2023.
